label: near_miss

case_target.description: 当前 case 的主控制对象是 greet()，它固定模板源并把用户输入仅作为 context variable 传入。

should_not_report.reason: The template string _GREETING_TEMPLATE is a static constant with a {{ name }} placeholder. User input is passed as a context variable (kwarg), never concatenated into the template source. _sanitize_name() further validates the input against a strict alphanumeric regex before it reaches render_template_string().
should_not_report.false_positive_risk: A system that flags any call to render_template_string() where a user-derived variable appears in scope — without distinguishing between context-variable injection and template-source injection — will produce a false positive at line 24.

controls.description: Strict regex allowlist permits only alphanumeric characters, spaces, underscores, and hyphens up to 64 chars. Jinja2 control characters {{ }} % # are excluded.
name is passed as a context variable kwarg, not concatenated into the template string. The template source _GREETING_TEMPLATE is a module-level constant that cannot be influenced by user input.

notes: Key distinction from SSTI-PY-FILE-001: template source is static; user data enters only as a context variable. The regex allowlist is defense-in-depth, not the primary control — the static template is.
